important: All rates and calculations are based on 2024-2025 tax years
Rates are subject to change - always verify with official government sources
Calculations assume single filer with no dependents unless otherwise noted
Employee contributions only (employer contributions not included in net salary)
Currency values shown are the official currency; actual value may vary due to exchange rates
Local/municipal taxes and deductions may apply additionally
Some countries have alternative tax regimes for specific income types
Self-employed and freelancer rates may differ significantly from employed rates
Progressive brackets shown are cumulative - not marginal rates applied to total income
notes.dataAccuracy: High - based on official government tax authority sources
notes.disclaimer: This data is provided for informational purposes. Individuals should consult with tax professionals in their jurisdiction for accurate calculations.
